CLAWBACK POLICY The Board of Directors (the Board) of Provident Financial Services, Inc. (the Company) believes that it is in the best interests of the Company and its stockholders to adopt this Clawback Policy (the Policy), which provides for the recovery of certain incentive compensation in the event of an accounting restatement.
